channel.title: 0ad on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in 0ad on Have an average day :|

item.title: 0ad is coming together nicely!
item.description: I love a good RTS. Sadly there hasn’t been any in a very long time. Everyone who makes an RTS tries to do it differently and keeps adding things that completely ruin the mechanics. Case in point anything past Supreme Commander 2 and Red-Alert 2. Now 0AD feels and looks like the RTS games I feel in love with. They just released Alpha 13 and I can’t wait to play it.
